nasb.text: Now many people were gathered at Jerusalem to celebrate the Feast of Unleavened Bread in the second month, a very large assembly.

esv.text: And many people came together in Jerusalem to keep the Feast of Unleavened Bread in the second month, a very great assembly.

cnv.text: 二月，有很多人在耶路撒冷聚集，要舉行無酵節，集合了一大群會眾。

ccb.text: 二月，大群的人聚到耶路撒冷守除酵节。
